scripts.check: bun run check:transcript-virtualizer && bun run check:rust-owned-transcript-viewport && svelte-kit sync && tsgo --noEmit -p ./tsconfig.fast.json
scripts.check:fast: bun run check:transcript-virtualizer && bun run check:rust-owned-transcript-viewport && svelte-kit sync && tsgo --noEmit -p ./tsconfig.fast.json
scripts.test: bun run check:diagnostic-import-boundary && bun run check:conversation-builder-import-boundary && bun run check:tauri-invokes && bun ../../scripts/forbid-structural-tests.ts src && AGENT=1 bun test $(find src -type f \( -name '*.test.ts' -o -name '*.vitest.ts' \))
scripts.test:vitest: bun run check:diagnostic-import-boundary && bun run check:conversation-builder-import-boundary && bun run check:tauri-invokes && bun ../../scripts/forbid-structural-tests.ts src && vitest run
scripts.test:rust: cd src-tauri && cargo nextest run --no-default-features -E 'not test(claude_history::export_types)' && cargo test --no-default-features --doc
scripts.test:rust:fast: cd src-tauri && cargo nextest run --lib -E 'not test(claude_history::export_types)'
scripts.test:rust:manual: cd src-tauri && cargo test --features manual-test-targets --test startup_scan_benchmark && cargo test --features manual-test-targets --test indexer_benchmark && cargo test --features manual-test-targets --test codex_scanner_benchmark && cargo test --features manual-test-targets --test codex_scanner_test && cargo test --features manual-test-targets --test voice_transcription && cargo test --features manual-test-targets --test acp_session_list_probe
scripts.tauri:sccache: TAURI_CLI_WATCHER_IGNORE_FILENAME=.taurignore env -u RUSTC_WRAPPER CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_BUILD_RUSTC_WRAPPER=sccache tauri dev
